name: pagopa-email-templates
description: All the mail templates used by pagoPA
author: Damiano Plebani

scripts.generate: yarn generateFailedState && yarn generatePaymentPending && yarn generatePaymentCompleted && yarn generatePaymentRefund
scripts.generateFailedState: node compileHandlebars.js --templateDir FailedState --data failed.json && node compileMjml.js --templateDir FailedState
scripts.generatePaymentRefund: node compileHandlebars.js --templateDir PaymentRefund && node compileMjml.js --templateDir PaymentRefund
scripts.generatePaymentCompleted: node compileHandlebars.js --templateDir PaymentCompleted --data single-cart.json && node compileMjml.js --templateDir PaymentCompleted
scripts.generatePaymentCompleted-stressTest: node compileHandlebars.js --templateDir PaymentCompleted --data single-cart-stress-test.json && node compileMjml.js --templateDir PaymentCompleted
scripts.generatePaymentCompleted-multipleItems: node compileHandlebars.js --templateDir PaymentCompleted --data multiple-cart-items.json && node compileMjml.js --templateDir PaymentCompleted
scripts.generatePaymentPending: node compileHandlebars.js --templateDir PaymentPending --data single-cart.json && node compileMjml.js --templateDir PaymentPending
scripts.generatePaymentPending-multipleItems: node compileHandlebars.js --templateDir PaymentPending --data multiple-cart-items.json && node compileMjml.js --templateDir PaymentPending
